issues.title: Ruptured high-pressure water main flooding Ring Road underpass
issues.description: Water has been gushing out of a primary 400mm main pipe joint on the Ring Road underpass since 4:00 AM, creating a severe gridlock and eroding the pavement foundation.

aiTriage.english_summary: A major water main break on the New Delhi Ring Road is causing severe street flooding and pavement erosion. Immediate intervention is required.

issues.adminReply:
Delhi Jal Board (DJB) quick response plumbing division was dispatched immediately.

  • Main isolation bypass valves successfully closed
  • Ruptured high-pressure connection replaced and fully pressure-tested
  • Underpass drained completely and pavement foundation stabilized with rapid-cure concrete

Normal traffic has resumed with zero pressure drops detected across the neighborhood.
issues.resolvedBy: Office of the Chief Engineer, DJB

comments.text: This is a massive relief! The water pressure in our area has stabilized as well. Kudos to the DJB team for their quick turnaround.
Yes, I drove past this morning and the underpass was completely clear. Excellent job with the rapid-cure concrete!

issues.title: Missing pedestrian zebra crossings at Chandni Chowk busy market junction
issues.description: The primary road crossing striping has completely faded near the main market square. Children, shoppers, and elderly citizens are struggling to cross safely during busy evening hours because vehicles do not yield.

aiTriage.english_summary: High pedestrian hazards near Chandni Chowk market due to completely faded zebra crossings. Vehicles are refusing to yield to pedestrians.

issues.title: Dangling high-voltage electric cables next to Lajpat Nagar market
issues.description: Loose high-voltage power lines are hanging dangerously low, touching tree branches right above the crowded pedestrian walking path. With the monsoon rain starting, this poses an extreme risk of electrocution.

aiTriage.english_summary: Unsecured high-voltage overhead lines hanging dangerously close to pedestrian walkways present an immediate risk of electrocution.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Delhi Power Distribution Control Room (BSES Rajdhani) for urgent reinforcement.

issues.title: Severe garbage dumping pile blocking sidewalks along East Delhi bypass
issues.description: Uncontrolled commercial garbage dumping has blocked the entire side path near the bypass road. The decomposition is attracting strays, creating intense stench, and forcing pedestrians to walk on the busy highway.

aiTriage.english_summary: Large illegal garbage pile on sidewalks blocking pedestrian lanes and creating public health hazards along the East Delhi bypass.

issues.title: Deep hazardous pothole expanding near Dwarka Sector 10 Metro Pillar
issues.description: A massive crater-like pothole has opened up directly under the metro line. It is highly invisible at night, causing several near-accidents for two-wheelers already.

aiTriage.english_summary: A large expanding pothole directly in the driving lane under Dwarka Metro Pillar poses extreme risk to night commuters.

issues.title: A family of monkeys hosting a synchronized general assembly on the power lines
issues.description: Spotted this absolute meeting of the minds near New Delhi. They are literally hanging out in an orderly fashion, looking like they're voting on community laws.

aiTriage.english_summary: Local resident shares a humorous photo of a family of monkeys gathered together on overhead power cables in Mumbai.

comments.text: This is hilarious! Though dangerous for the monkeys, it's nice to see some humor in our daily commute.
Agreed, but hope BSES can check if the insulation is secure so no monkeys get hurt!

issues.title: Proposal to build an air-conditioned dome covering the entire city of Delhi
issues.description: The summer is way too hot. If we construct a giant air-conditioned glass dome over Delhi, we can maintain a cool 22°C year-round. Highly urgent, please pass this budget!

aiTriage.english_summary: A highly unrealistic, cost-prohibitive proposal requesting a giant glass dome to air-condition the entirety of Delhi.

issues.title: Dangerous non-functional streetlights on flyover near Rohini Sector 15
issues.description: An entire 500m stretch of the flyover is pitch black at night due to broken light fixtures. This has become a hotspot for rash driving and security concerns.

aiTriage.english_summary: Major safety concerns over a long stretch of dark flyover in Rohini due to complete failure of municipal streetlights.

issues.adminReply:
Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD) electrical repair division completed the repair work.

  • Replaced 12 failed high-intensity LED cobra-head luminaires
  • Replaced damaged underground sub-mains power cable
  • Calibrated the automated twilight sensors

The flyover is now fully lit and secure for night driving.

issues.title: Chemical dye residue being dumped directly into stormwater drain
issues.description: Local illegal washing unit is letting out colorful chemical-ridden waste water straight into the rainwater stormwater drain, causing toxic smell and soil contamination.

aiTriage.english_summary: Hazardous chemical dumping into community storm drains is causing toxic contamination and air pollution.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Delhi Pollution Control Committee (DPCC) for immediate inspection and enforcement.

issues.title: Persistent water supply contamination with muddy brown sludge in Colaba area
issues.description: For the last 5 days, residents of Colaba Sector 3 are receiving dirty, highly turbid water with a foul smell. It's completely unusable for cooking and drinking.

aiTriage.english_summary: Dirty, contaminated muddy water is flowing from domestic taps in Colaba Sector 3, presenting severe public health risks.

issues.title: Crudely patched potholes sinking on Marine Drive Promenade walkpath
issues.description: The recent patch-up on the pedestrian walking path has already sunk, creating multiple trip hazards for senior citizens who walk here in the mornings.

aiTriage.english_summary: Sinking asphalt patches on Marine Drive promenade pose tripping risks for morning joggers and elderly citizens.

issues.title: Damaged electric distribution box with live wires exposed on SV Road, Andheri
issues.description: A feeder pillar box has its metal door completely ripped off. Live copper terminals are exposed and active, located right next to a busy bus stop where children wait.

aiTriage.english_summary: An open electrical distributor cabinet with live, active terminals exposed right next to a school bus stop presents extreme immediate electrocution hazard.

issues.dispatchLog: Forwarded to MSEDCL Andheri West division emergency team with high priority dispatch order.

issues.title: Overflows from sewage channel spreading onto Baner main commercial road
issues.description: A blocked sewage line is bubbling out black water, pooling in front of retail stores. It's creating an awful stench and a severe public health hazard.

aiTriage.english_summary: Bubbling sewage blockages in Baner commercial street is causing black water pooling, creating a biohazard for shoppers and business owners.

issues.title: Broken municipal water valve wasting thousands of liters hourly in Dharampeth
issues.description: A major flow regulator valve is leaking a high-pressure stream of water straight into the roadside gutter. No action has been taken since Tuesday.

aiTriage.english_summary: A damaged valve joint is causing massive clean water waste into storm drains along Dharampeth Road.

issues.adminReply:
Nagpur Municipal Corporation (NMC) water maintenance team replaced the gasket and flow gate.

  • Sluice valve isolation completed
  • Eroded steel seals replaced with high-durability polymer gaskets
  • Reinstalled under pressure lock to check for leaks

The valve is now fully sealed with zero leakage.

issues.title: Severe borewell water table depletion and illegal tanker pricing in HSR Layout
issues.description: Many houses have dry borewells. Private tankers are exploiting the water crisis by charging triple the official rate. We need tanker regulation or municipal line expansion.

aiTriage.english_summary: Water scarcity and price gouging by private tanker cartels in HSR Layout following dry ground aquifers.

comments.text: Completely agree, they are charging Rs. 2000 per tanker now! BWSSB must intervene.

issues.title: Massive open trench left unfinished after fiber-optic cable laying in Indiranagar
issues.description: Telecom contractors dug up 100 meters of the busy 12th Main road sidewalk and left it open with no barricades. Pedestrians have to step onto traffic to bypass it.

aiTriage.english_summary: Unrestored pavements and open trenches on Indiranagar 12th Main present dangerous conditions, forcing citizens to walk in busy driving lanes.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to BBMP Chief Engineer (Road Infrastructure) to issue immediate notice to the telecomm service provider.

issues.title: Unattended compost plant stench choking residents near Hebbal
issues.description: The waste processing center is letting out unbearable toxic fumes at night due to poor maintenance of the dry-bio filters. Children are developing respiratory issues.

aiTriage.english_summary: Unbearable sour smells from compost facility in Hebbal due to malfunctioning air bio-scrubbers, creating breathing trouble for neighboring citizens.

issues.title: Faded solar-powered park lighting system in Kukkarahalli Lake walk
issues.description: Almost all solar lamps along the lakeside track have dead batteries and do not light up. Walking in the evening has become unsafe due to absolute darkness.

aiTriage.english_summary: Complete blackout of solar street lighting on the popular Kukkarahalli Lake walk track, posing safety hazards for evening walkers.

issues.title: Low pressure and salt-water intrusion in municipal supply lines at Egmore
issues.description: Water pressure has dropped dramatically. Furthermore, the water tastes extremely salty, indicating potential seawater seepage into our drinking water pipeline.

aiTriage.english_summary: Salinity intrusion and low pressure in Chennai Metro-water conduits around Egmore area, pointing to potential sea or estuarine brackish water ingress.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Chennai Metro Water Supply and Sewerage Board (CMWSSB) lab testing division for chemical sampling.

issues.title: Extremely uneven concrete slabs on OMR service lanes causing motorbike slips
issues.description: The concrete slabs laid over the drainage channels are highly uneven with 3-inch sharp lips. Several two-wheeler riders have lost control and crashed this week.

aiTriage.english_summary: Misaligned pre-cast storm drain covers along the busy IT Corridor service roads are acting as road bumps, crashing motorbikes.

issues.title: Huge garbage heap accumulating outside the central vegetable market
issues.description: Organic waste, rotten vegetables, and plastic packaging are dumped directly in the public parking zone, blocking space and breeding millions of flies.

aiTriage.english_summary: Decomposing green waste and plastic heap in market parking zone blocking passage and breeding vectors.

issues.adminReply:
Coimbatore City Municipal Corporation (CCMC) green waste team cleared the site completely.

  • 6 metric tons of organic sludge hauled to bio-methanation plant
  • Disinfection spray and bleaching powder treatment performed on concrete
  • Placed dynamic containment bin to restrict open dumping

The marketplace loading bay is completely clean and hygienic.

issues.title: Clogged drainage channels causing instant waterlogging in Hazratganj Crossroads
issues.description: Even with mild showers, the central shopping avenue becomes a lake because the colonial-era drains are packed with silt and plastic cups. Needs immediate desiltation.

aiTriage.english_summary: Flooding of core Hazratganj marketplace under moderate precipitation caused by siltation of heritage masonry storm drains.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Lucknow Nagar Nigam (LNN) Drainage and Silt Removal division for emergency vacuum desilting.

issues.title: Non-clearance of trash bins leading to stray cow feeding hazards at Assi Ghat
issues.description: Garbage bins near the entry point are completely overflowing. Stray animals are rummaging through plastic bags, consuming plastic, and blocking tourist pathways.

aiTriage.english_summary: Littering and non-clearance of secondary trash bins near Assi Ghat causing stray animals to ingest plastics and block pedestrian thoroughfares.

issues.title: Frequent unannounced power cuts and voltage fluctuations in Sector 62
issues.description: Frequent power trips (8-10 times daily) are frying domestic appliances. The local sub-station team says the transformer is overloaded but refuses to upgrade it.

aiTriage.english_summary: Voltage dips and frequent load sheds in Noida Sector 62 indicating over-stressed localized distribution grids and power step-down units.

issues.title: Crumbling road bridge structural joints on GT Road near industrial area
issues.description: The expansion joints of the old flyover have separated by more than 4 inches. Heavy trucks cause the entire concrete deck to vibrate excessively. Extremely scary!

aiTriage.english_summary: Severe expansion gap deterioration on old flyover on GT road causing high vibrations under dynamic transit loads. Requires immediate structural verification.

issues.title: Underground sewage mixing with Metro-water supply in Thiruvanmiyur
issues.description: Residents are receiving foul-smelling black water from their taps. It is highly contaminated with domestic sewage due to a pipe crack.

aiTriage.english_summary: Cross-contamination between broken sewage main and municipal water line in Thiruvanmiyur, producing high health hazards.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Chennai Metro Water (CMWSSB) South Zone pipeline maintenance division with immediate excavation order.

issues.title: Massive leakage from raw water pipeline near Katraj Lake bypass
issues.description: Hundreds of gallons of clean municipal drinking water are being wasted through a pinhole puncture in the main steel conduit.

aiTriage.english_summary: Water spraying under high pressure from primary steel conduit pipe near Katraj, wasting municipal reserves.

issues.adminReply:
Pune Municipal Corporation (PMC) pipeline division welded the puncture joint successfully.

  • Completed metal sleeve wrapping
  • Under pressure carbon arc welding finalized
  • Insulation layer restored around pipeline

The pressure leak has been fully secured with zero outflow.

issues.title: Zero municipal water pressure for upper floor flats in Sigra Colony
issues.description: The booster pumps at the sub-station have failed, leading to dry pipes for any home on the 1st floor or higher.

aiTriage.english_summary: Sub-station booster pump failure in Sigra water distribution zone, preventing supply elevation.

issues.title: Hard ground-water TDS levels exceeding 1800 ppm in Sector 137 apartments
issues.description: The local filtration unit is non-functional. Drinking water TDS has crossed safe human consumption limits, causing skin irritation and hair fall.

aiTriage.english_summary: Groundwater filtration systems failing in Sector 137, sending highly basic mineral water into residential networks.

issues.title: Broken safety railing on Gomti Riverfront walkway near Gomti Nagar
issues.description: A 15-foot section of the steel protection rail has collapsed into the river, posing a severe drowning risk to toddlers playing in the park.

aiTriage.english_summary: A damaged shoreline railing segment on the Gomti walking park poses high public safety hazards, especially for children.

issues.adminReply:
Lucknow Development Authority (LDA) parks division completed the railing replacement.

  • Damaged anchor columns cleared
  • Seated 3-inch thick steel replacement rails
  • Coated with anti-rust epoxy sealant

The protection barrier is now fully restored and secure for visitors.

issues.title: Faded signboards and missing speed humps near Blind School Crossroads
issues.description: Vehicles speed through this blind curve at 70km/h. There are zero cautionary signs or rumble strips, causing multiple close calls for visually impaired students.

aiTriage.english_summary: Dangerous traffic speeding on curve outside the visually impaired students academy, due to lack of speed breakers and warning banners.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to Nagpur Municipal Traffic Engineering cell to design and place speed humps and reflective signboards.

issues.title: Severe sidewalk encroachment by commercial displays on Devaraja Urs Road
issues.description: Shopkeepers have placed metal mannequins and display boards completely blocking the walking tracks, forcing pedestrians into live traffic.

aiTriage.english_summary: Illegal retail kiosks and commercial displays fully choking the walkways on Devaraja Urs Road.

issues.title: Deep asphalt fissures and broken road margins on Outer Ring Road, Manyata Tech Park
issues.description: The heavy rainfall has eroded the asphalt layer at the margins, creating a dangerous 6-inch drop-off that catches car tires.

aiTriage.english_summary: Erosion of road shoulder surfaces on Outer Ring Road near Manyata entry, presenting crash risks for fast driving lanes.

issues.title: Non-functioning streetlights near Central Railway Station taxi stand
issues.description: The entire taxi loading bay is pitch dark, creating security concerns for late-night passengers arriving at Chennai Central.

aiTriage.english_summary: Major electrical failure on street lighting columns servicing the central railway station transit taxi terminals.

issues.adminReply:
Chennai Corporation electrical division resolved the circuit fault.

  • Completed repair of 150m failed armored electrical underground cabling
  • Installed 4 new high-output LED spotlight arrays
  • Tightened distribution lugs inside feeder terminal

The taxi transit lanes are now bright, safe, and fully functional.

issues.title: Sagging overhead telecom cable bunches blocking bus parking at Jhakarkati
issues.description: Low-hanging internet fiber bundles are getting caught in the roofs of state transit buses, snapping cables and disrupting services.

aiTriage.english_summary: Overhead private internet cables sagging dangerously inside the state bus depot, disrupting bus transit layouts.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to UP Power Corporation Limited (UPPCL) and local telecom regulators to untangle and elevate the cabling.

issues.title: Sparking transformer unit during hot afternoon peak load hours in Gandhipuram
issues.description: The local 250kVA transformer makes loud popping sounds and shoots sparks whenever air conditioners run at peak hours. It's a major fire hazard.

aiTriage.english_summary: Sub-station step down unit overloading and sparking during grid peaks, creating critical electrical fire risks in dense markets.

issues.title: Faulty twilight sensors keeping streetlights on all day in Jayanagar 4th Block
issues.description: Hundreds of LED streetlights remain lit even in bright noon sunshine. This is a massive waste of taxpayer money and electrical energy.

aiTriage.english_summary: Automated dusk-to-dawn switches malfunctioning in Jayanagar J Block, keeping lamps on persistently in broad daylight.

issues.title: Massive plastic debris clogging Versova Creek outlet and mangrove belt
issues.description: Multi-layered heaps of single-use plastics are choked at the creek inlet, stopping natural tidal flows and killing local mangrove plants.

aiTriage.english_summary: Extensive accumulation of non-biodegradable plastics choking creek ecosystems and preventing mangrove swamp oxygenation.

issues.title: Medical waste dumped in municipal garbage bins near Chowk market
issues.description: Used syringes, intravenous bags, and blood vials are mixed with domestic waste behind the local hospital, presenting severe bio-hazard risks.

aiTriage.english_summary: Unsegregated biomedical waste containing active sharps and fluids found in public trash bins, representing high infection vectors.

issues.dispatchLog: Dispatched to State Pollution Control Board and Health Enforcement squad to levy immediate penalty on defaulting clinic.

issues.title: Open sewage drain overflowing next to primary school boundary in Sector 50
issues.description: The storm drain is clogged with solid waste, causing stagnant sludge to rise and overflow right outside the school gate. The mosquito breeding is insane.

aiTriage.english_summary: Standing sewage overflowing outside school gate due to structural silt blockage, creating vector breeding hot-spots.

issues.adminReply:
Noida Authority sanitation squad completed high-pressure water jetting desiltation.

  • Solid plastic blocks and silt removed from 25m drain stretch
  • Elevated brick walls by 1.5 feet to seal the drain
  • Spread heavy dose of chemical larvicides to eliminate mosquitoes

The drain is now flowing normally with secure barriers outside the school gates.

issues.title: Broken garbage compactor spreading liquid leachate on Connaught Place Circle
issues.description: The garbage truck compactor is leaking a toxic, foul-smelling dark liquid right on the main walking plaza, making the entire area smell like a landfill.

aiTriage.english_summary: Leachate spills from broken container seals of sanitation truck at Connaught Place plaza producing strong smells and slippery walking tiles.

issues.title: Proposal to paint all local administrative offices in bright neon pink
issues.description: White and beige are so boring! Neon pink will make municipal offices look incredibly energetic and boost officer productivity by at least 20%. Please implement!

aiTriage.english_summary: Resident proposes to paint public administration buildings neon pink under the unscientific premise that it boosts productivity.

issues.title: Local street dog 'Sheru' appointed as chief supervisor of road laying works
issues.description: Sheru sits next to the asphalt roller every day, inspecting the concrete and barking at workers if they skip a spot. He deserves an honorary badge!

aiTriage.english_summary: Citizens post humorous report of a stray street dog watching road-roller work, nominating him for municipal supervisor honor.

issues.title: Request to rename Indiranagar 100 Feet Road to 'Filter Coffee Boulevard'
issues.description: There are so many cafes serving filter coffee on this road, it's basically the official drink. This will attract tourists and give the area a unique branding!

aiTriage.english_summary: Lighthearted petition to rename a major central highway following high concentration of traditional filter coffee shops.

issues.title: Request to build a flying carpet transit network over the Ganga river
issues.description: Traffic in the narrow lanes is very bad. Flying carpets are eco-friendly, zero-emission, and would be a great traditional transport option!

aiTriage.english_summary: Absurd and fantasy-based transport suggestion requesting flying carpet operations above water bodies to avoid traffic.
